title: Comfy Touhou
description: A Touhou modpack with a comfy, immersive and natural atmosphere.
body:
A modpack focused on Touhou, with a comfy and immersive atmosphere, and a love for nature.


![chimata orb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69c6e16c5a44048eca58d987c2cf30ffb5445df7.gif)

[Read the Arcadian Dreams documentation!](https://docs.reimaden.net/arcadian-dream/features/danmaku/)


<details>
<summary>Youkai Origins & Complementary mods</summary>

- Earth Rabbit
- Lunar Rabbit
- Kappa
- - Create mod plus addons! Create cogwheel contraptions!
- Yuki-Onna
- Celestial
- Tsukumogami
- Kitsune
- Fairy
- - Enjoy nature with the enhanced atmosphere!
- Ghost
- Wolf Tengu
- Crow Tengu
- - Alcohol! Let's Do Brewing!
- Satori
- Oni
- - Alcohol! Oni like it even more than tengu! Unfortunately modded alcohol doesn't work with the origin, instead potions count as "alcohol" that satiates them, and they grow stronger the more negative effects they're under. Still though, should that stop you from making the best brewery in Gensokyo?
- Vengeful Spirit
- Kurayami (Darkness Youkai, Rumia)
- Jiang Shi
- Vampire
- Haniwa
- Hell Raven
- Inchling
- Magician
- - Enchanted: Witchcraft (Marisa-style witchcraft)
- - Scriptor Magicae (Patchouli book magic, not explicitly elemental however. Create your own spells!)
- Feline (Basic origin, but fits Chen)
- Arachnid (Basic origin, Yamame)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Major mods</summary>

For a full list, check the dependencies for a particular version, or check the Mods menu in-game.

## Touhou

### Touhou Little Maid Orihime
Your very own Touhou waifu who will help you with tasks!

### Touhou Origins & Touhou Blessings
Be a youkai!

### Arcadian Dreams
Touhou stuff, including danmaku!

### Eirin Yagokoro's Pharmacy
Genuine Eientei elixirs!

### Lunarian Dream
buh

## Comfy

### Many [Let's Do] mods!
Makes nature more beautiful, adds animals, biomes, farming stuff, wines, brewing, and more.

### Fabric Seasons
omg hidden star in four seasons reference 

### Farmer's Delight
Yummy food!

### Fetzi's Asian Decorations
Japanese architecture!

### Ribbits
Froggies!


## Immersion

### Sound Physics Remastered
Acoustics!

### Ambient Sounds
#listentonature

### Wildfire's Female Gender
Be female!

Many more mods such as First-Person, Not Enough Animations, etc.

## QoL / Polishing / Tech Stuff
- Better F3
- No Telemetry
- I Know How To Play
- Sodium
- Iris
- JEI
- Xaero's Maps

</details>


### Tips

- Use G to set gender
- Use JEI!
- Fight maids for points and power items.

Included are 3 shaders,
- Use Rethinking Voxels if you have a high-end PC that can handle raytracing.
- Use Complementary Unbound if that's too much, or for more conistent handheld light.
- Use Potato Shaders if you have a lower-end machine
- And of course, turn them off if you need every frame you can get.

# 1.1 UPDATE

## Fixed:
- Fixed rendering issues with missing models by adding Indium
﻿
## Added:
- For the kappa, added some Create mods! To get started, click on the goggles icon in the pause menu to Ponder. Also, type @create into the JEI searchbar to find the addon recipes.
﻿
- For the magicians, added Enchanted: Witchcraft (Marisa-style), Scriptor Magicae (Patchouli-style? It's not explicitly about elements but it's all about books.) and Runic Enchanting.
﻿
- - "Enchanted has an in-game guide in called "Art of Witchcraft", crafted using a book, an ink sac, a feather and belladonna seeds. You can get these by breaking grass, just like vanilla seeds."
﻿
- - Scriptor Magicae has a guide that can be found as loot in the world.
﻿
- - An explanation for Runic Enchanting can be found [here.](https://modrinth.com/mod/runic-enchanting)
